nasb.text: So as to buy the helpless for money And the needy for a pair of sandals, And that we may sell the refuse of the wheat?”

esv.text: that we may buy the poor for silver and the needy for a pair of sandals and sell the chaff of the wheat?”

cnv.text: 我們用銀子買窮人， 用一雙鞋換取窮乏人； 連麥碎也賣掉。”

ccb.text: 你们用银子买贫民， 以一双鞋买穷人为奴， 售卖掺了糠秕的麦子。
